instructions.name: activate_project
docs: Transition Fundraising → Active once soft cap is reached.
Tokens become transferable on secondary markets after activation.

instructions.name: add_milestone
docs: Add a milestone to a Draft project.
Milestones must be added sequentially (index 0, 1, 2 …).
Sum of all milestone release_bps must equal 10_000 before start_fundraising.

instructions.name: admin_resolve
docs: Admin multisig resolves a project dispute.
Decisions: PayInvestors | RefundAndExtend | ForceClose.
Transitions DisputeActive → Resolved.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Must be the protocol admin (multisig in production).

instructions.name: buy_tokens
docs: Investor purchases fractional tokens with USDC.
USDC is held in escrow vault; tokens represent ownership shares.

instructions.name: cancel_fundraise
docs: Cancel fundraising. Allowed when soft cap not met, or developer explicit cancel
before target is reached. After cancel, investors can call claim_refund.

instructions.name: claim_distribution
docs: Token holder claims their proportional share of a distribution round.
Rounds must be claimed sequentially to prevent skip-and-claim exploits.

instructions.name: claim_refund
docs: Investor reclaims USDC after fundraise is cancelled.

instructions.name: deposit_income
docs: Developer deposits rental income or sale proceeds for proportional distribution.
Creates a DistributionPool with a snapshot of circulating token supply.

accounts.name: project_token_mint
docs: Project token mint — snapshot of supply taken here

instructions.name: dispute_milestone
docs: Token holder disputes a milestone proof during the dispute window.

instructions.name: execute_transfer_hook
docs: Token-2022 TransferHook entry point.
Called automatically by the Token-2022 program on every project token transfer.
Updates InvestorPosition.tokens_held for both parties.

accounts.name: source_position
docs: Sender's InvestorPosition — optional because sender may not have a position
(e.g. the program itself during mint/burn operations)

accounts.name: destination_position
docs: Receiver's InvestorPosition — optional for same reason

instructions.name: flag_developer
docs: Flag a developer as a bad actor. Sets is_blacklisted = true on DeveloperProfile.
Prevents future project creation by this developer.

instructions.name: freeze_developer
docs: Freeze the developer's token account after PayInvestors decision.
Uses Token-2022 freeze authority held by the project_state PDA.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin authority — same check as admin_resolve.

accounts.name: developer_token_account
docs: Developer's token account holding their collateral.

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: The project token mint — must have freeze_authority set to project_state PDA.

instructions.name: initialize_project
docs: Create a new real estate project (Residential / Commercial / Agricultural).
Initialises ProjectState PDA, TokenConfig PDA, and USDC escrow vault.
Project starts in Draft state; milestones must be added before fundraising.

accounts.name: developer_profile
docs: Developer profile PDA — created on first project, checked for blacklist on subsequent ones.

instructions.name: pause_project
docs: Emergency pause — freezes all state-mutating operations.

instructions.name: raise_dispute
docs: Raise a project-level dispute. Transitions Active/InMilestones → DisputeActive.
Starts 72-hour resolution window.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Either the developer or any token holder may raise a dispute.

instructions.name: release_milestone_funds
docs: Oracle releases escrowed USDC to developer after dispute window elapses.
Final milestone transitions project → Completed.

instructions.name: resolve_dispute
docs: Arbitration authority resolves a disputed milestone.
approved=true: re-opens for release. approved=false: developer must resubmit.

accounts.name: arbitration_authority
docs: Arbitration authority — multisig in production. Set per-project at init
or use a protocol-wide governance key stored in a separate ProtocolConfig PDA.

instructions.name: start_fundraising
docs: Transition project from Draft → Fundraising.
Requires all milestones added and total release_bps == 10_000.

instructions.name: submit_evidence
docs: Submit IPFS evidence hash during the 72-hour dispute window.
Either party (developer or investor) may call this.

accounts.name: submitter
docs: Developer or any investor may submit evidence during the dispute window.

instructions.name: submit_milestone_proof
docs: Oracle submits construction milestone proof.
Opens a 48-hour dispute window before funds can be released.

instructions.name: unpause_project
docs: Remove emergency pause.

instructions.name: update_oracle
docs: Initiate a 48-hour timelock oracle key rotation.
Call again after timelock to finalise the rotation.

errors.name: InvalidProjectState
errors.msg: Invalid project state for this operation

errors.name: FundraisingDeadlineNotPassed
errors.msg: Fundraising deadline has not passed yet

errors.name: ZeroTokenAmount
errors.msg: Token amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: MilestoneBpsOverflow
errors.msg: Milestone release basis points would exceed 10000

errors.name: MilestoneBpsNotComplete
errors.msg: Total milestone basis points must equal 10000 to start fundraising

errors.name: InvalidMilestoneStatus
errors.msg: Milestone is not in the expected status

errors.name: MilestonesIncomplete
errors.msg: Not all milestones have been added

errors.name: InvalidOracle
errors.msg: Signer is not the oracle authority

errors.name: NoTokensHeld
errors.msg: No tokens held to claim distribution

errors.name: ZeroDistributionAmount
errors.msg: Distribution amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: TransferFeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Transfer fee basis points exceed maximum (500 bps)

errors.name: InvalidArbitrationAuthority
errors.msg: Signer is not the arbitration authority

errors.name: InvalidProofHash
errors.msg: Proof hash cannot be all zeros

errors.name: NotDisputable
errors.msg: Project is not in an active disputable state

errors.name: NotInDispute
errors.msg: Project is not in DisputeActive state

errors.name: DisputeWindowStillOpen
errors.msg: Dispute resolution window is still open

errors.name: InvalidAdmin
errors.msg: Signer is not the admin authority

errors.name: DeveloperBlacklisted
errors.msg: Developer is blacklisted and cannot create new projects

types.name: DeveloperProfile
docs: Per-developer reputation and blacklist record.
PDA seeds: [b"developer_profile", developer_pubkey]
Created on first project init; updated on milestone/dispute events.

fields.name: usdc_per_token_scaled
docs: Fixed-point: (total_usdc * 10^12) / total_tokens

fields.name: claim_deadline
docs: 0 = no expiry

fields.name: interest_rate_bps
docs: Nominal interest rate in bps for display purposes (0 = none)
